markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Explore potential collaboration between StackBlitz and fwd.digital for AI-driven content creation and programmatic page generation.](https://fathom.video/share/xrBtyM4vKxoLsm5Yv5JzpmqTq2DzFAnp?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [fwd.digital offers AI-powered content creation with human oversight, using a custom-built framework for efficient AI workflows](https://fathom.video/share/xrBtyM4vKxoLsm5Yv5JzpmqTq2DzFAnp?tab=summary&timestamp=13.0)
  - [StackBlitz is interested in creating pre-built templates and enriched content for their B2C audience of non-technical to semi-technical users](https://fathom.video/share/xrBtyM4vKxoLsm5Yv5JzpmqTq2DzFAnp?tab=summary&timestamp=27.0)
  - [Both parties are excited about a potential partnership, focusing on value creation rather than immediate revenue extraction](https://fathom.video/share/xrBtyM4vKxoLsm5Yv5JzpmqTq2DzFAnp?tab=summary&timestamp=47.0)
  - [A follow-up meeting will be scheduled to discuss specific ideas and scope for the collaboration](https://fathom.video/share/xrBtyM4vKxoLsm5Yv5JzpmqTq2DzFAnp?tab=summary&timestamp=60.0)

## Topics

### StackBlitz's Current Position and Growth

  - [Recently raised funding with Madrona as an investor](https://fathom.video/share/xrBtyM4vKxoLsm5Yv5JzpmqTq2DzFAnp?tab=summary&timestamp=333.0)
  - [Reached $6.1M ARR, growing rapidly for a SaaS company](https://fathom.video/share/xrBtyM4vKxoLsm5Yv5JzpmqTq2DzFAnp?tab=summary&timestamp=333.0)
  - [Primarily B2C focused, with 60-70% of users being non-developers in tech roles](https://fathom.video/share/xrBtyM4vKxoLsm5Yv5JzpmqTq2DzFAnp?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)
  - [Experiencing high growth but also high churn (20-50%) typical of B2C AI tools](https://fathom.video/share/xrBtyM4vKxoLsm5Yv5JzpmqTq2DzFAnp?tab=summary&timestamp=109.0)
  - [Planning to add an enterprise play for more durable revenue](https://fathom.video/share/xrBtyM4vKxoLsm5Yv5JzpmqTq2DzFAnp?tab=summary&timestamp=139.0)

### fwd.digital's Offerings and Capabilities

  - [Raised $12M in Series A funding with favorable terms](https://fathom.video/share/xrBtyM4vKxoLsm5Yv5JzpmqTq2DzFAnp?tab=summary&timestamp=323.0)
  - [Reached $6M ARR with 28% EBITDA and 71% gross margin in Q4](https://fathom.video/share/xrBtyM4vKxoLsm5Yv5JzpmqTq2DzFAnp?tab=summary&timestamp=352.0)
  - [Built a framework for creating AI workflows as code, allowing for scalable and efficient content creation](https://fathom.video/share/xrBtyM4vKxoLsm5Yv5JzpmqTq2DzFAnp?tab=summary&timestamp=744.0)
  - [Offers a combination of AI-driven processes and human expertise (e.g., managing directors from TripAdvisor, G2)](https://fathom.video/share/xrBtyM4vKxoLsm5Yv5JzpmqTq2DzFAnp?tab=summary&timestamp=662.0)
  - [Pricing starts at $12,000/month for programmatic content, with custom scoping for larger projects](https://fathom.video/share/xrBtyM4vKxoLsm5Yv5JzpmqTq2DzFAnp?tab=summary&timestamp=616.0)

### Potential Collaboration Ideas

  - [Create enriched template pages for StackBlitz, starting with AI-generated content and potentially evolving into user-generated templates](https://fathom.video/share/xrBtyM4vKxoLsm5Yv5JzpmqTq2DzFAnp?tab=summary&timestamp=1440.0)
  - [Focus on keywords and use cases relevant to StackBlitz's semi-technical audience](https://fathom.video/share/xrBtyM4vKxoLsm5Yv5JzpmqTq2DzFAnp?tab=summary&timestamp=1360.0)
  - [Develop a "bolt.new/template" concept with pre-built starting points for various projects](https://fathom.video/share/xrBtyM4vKxoLsm5Yv5JzpmqTq2DzFAnp?tab=summary&timestamp=1479.0)
  - [Aim for a partnership approach, prioritizing value creation over immediate revenue](https://fathom.video/share/xrBtyM4vKxoLsm5Yv5JzpmqTq2DzFAnp?tab=summary&timestamp=1662.0)

### Engagement Structure

  - [Standard 90-day pilot period with an opt-out option](https://fathom.video/share/xrBtyM4vKxoLsm5Yv5JzpmqTq2DzFAnp?tab=summary&timestamp=1272.0)
  - [After pilot, transitions to a one-year contract if satisfied](https://fathom.video/share/xrBtyM4vKxoLsm5Yv5JzpmqTq2DzFAnp?tab=summary&timestamp=1272.0)
  - [Flexible on pricing to ensure mutual benefit and exciting collaboration](https://fathom.video/share/xrBtyM4vKxoLsm5Yv5JzpmqTq2DzFAnp?tab=summary&timestamp=1662.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Marcel to discuss ideas with fwd.digital's CTO](https://fathom.video/share/xrBtyM4vKxoLsm5Yv5JzpmqTq2DzFAnp?tab=summary&timestamp=1646.0)
  - [Schedule a 30-minute follow-up meeting mid-next week](https://fathom.video/share/xrBtyM4vKxoLsm5Yv5JzpmqTq2DzFAnp?tab=summary&timestamp=1648.0)
  - [Develop specific ideas and scope for the collaboration](https://fathom.video/share/xrBtyM4vKxoLsm5Yv5JzpmqTq2DzFAnp?tab=summary&timestamp=1656.0)
  - [Explore pricing options that work for both parties, potentially at break-even for fwd.digital](https://fathom.video/share/xrBtyM4vKxoLsm5Yv5JzpmqTq2DzFAnp?tab=summary&timestamp=1662.0)
